title: Terminal
description: A generic, theme-able in-world terminal/computer UI engine for hi-tech tabletop games. Renders navigable screens from JSON data stored on flagged journals. Game-specific styling and content live in swappable themes and data documents.

recommended.reason: In-fiction timestamps on comments (and later inbox messages). Optional — falls back to real-world time if absent.

terminal.note: Data journals are discovered via flags.terminal.type on JournalEntry documents.
